envelope.subject: TCS — 4QFY26 Result Update; raises TP to ₹4,200
envelope.bodyText:
Dear Investor,

We maintain Buy on TCS and raise TP to ₹4,200 from ₹4,050. Q4 revenue beat consensus by 2.3% on BFSI strength. EBIT margin at 24.6% (+50bps QoQ). Order book TCV $12.1bn (book-to-bill 1.16x). Risks: US discretionary slowdown.

Full report attached.

attachmentRefs.text:
TCS — 4QFY26 Result Update.

Recommendation: Buy. PT ₹4,200 (prior ₹4,050).

Q4 revenue +2.3% vs consensus on BFSI demand. EBIT margin 24.6%, +50bps QoQ on cost discipline. Order book at $12.1bn TCV (book-to-bill 1.16x — best in 4 quarters).

Risks: US discretionary slowdown, INR appreciation.
